arts.ttl: Match Ratings: Borussia Dortmund Falter with Home Advantage
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund’s midfield was completely overrun by Lille, especially in the second half, and Pascal Gross’s age showed itself through this match. Lille’s goal and a terrible second half, however, showed the limits of Dortmund’s current talent.
